title: Minerals Coins
description: Adds Coins out of almost every Mineral in the game
body:
This mod adds Coins out of vanilla Minerals which can be then for example used on servers

## Items and recipes
**Chisel**
Chisel is used to make Coins by off-handing Chisel and holding the Mineral in your Main Hand 

(you will get 2 Coins per Mineral)

![Recipe of Chisel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d6794606b0a6dd2982ca20728989c20f77b5e1.png)

**Coins**
- Copper Coin, _made with Copper Ingot_
- Coal Coin, _made with Coal_
- Redstone Coin, _made with Redstone Dust_
- Lapis Lazuli Coin, _made with Lapis Lazuli_
- Quartz Coin, _made with Quartz_
- Gold Coin, _made with Gold Ingot_
- Emerald Coin, _made with Emerald_
- Amethyst Coin, _made with Amethyst Shard_
- Diamond Coin, _made with Diamond_
- Netherite Scrap Coin, _made with Netherite Scrap_
